allow: Bash(python3 -c "import re; content=open\('src/App.tsx','r',encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\); new=re.sub\(r'[ \\t]*<style>\\{.[\\s\\S]*?.\\}</style>\\n?', '\\n', content, flags=re.DOTALL\); open\('src/App.tsx','w',encoding='utf-8'\).write\(new\); print\('done'\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const c=fs.readFileSync\('src/App.tsx','utf8'\); const n=c.replace\(/[ \\t]*<style>\\{[\\x60][^]*?[\\x60]\\}<\\/style>\\n?/, '\\n'\); fs.writeFileSync\('src/App.tsx',n,'utf8'\); console.log\('done'\);")

Bash(node -e "const c=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('src/App.tsx','utf8'\); const checks = [\\"import './portfolio.css'\\", 'autoPlayRef', 'startAutoPlay', 'proj-progress', 'proj-progress-dot', 'proj-progress-fill']; checks.forEach\(s => console.log\(s + ':', c.includes\(s\) ? 'OK' : 'MISSING'\)\); console.log\('<style>:', c.includes\('<style>'\) ? 'PRESENT \(ERROR\)' : 'REMOVED OK'\);")

Bash(node -e "const c=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('src/portfolio.css','utf8'\); const checks = ['proj-progress', 'proj-progress-dot', 'proj-progress-fill', '--pink']; checks.forEach\(s => console.log\(s + ':', c.includes\(s\) ? 'OK' : 'MISSING'\)\);")
